description: Fail-loud: chronon3d_cli render must abort loudly when an asset's file extension does not match its declared kind. Per user-spec verbatim 'estensione sbagliata', this fixture extends the Test #7 fail-loud contract to the ASSET-KIND-VALIDATION stage. Canonical error vocabulary: Composition/Layer/Asset/Path tokens in stderr + kind/extension mismatch context, NO silent fallback markers, exit code != 0, output MP4 absent, error message MUST mention the asset name + the owner layer name + the kind/extension mismatch (per user-spec 'errore che indica asset+owner/layer').
_extension_mismatch_setup_hint: Pre-create /tmp/chronon_extension_mismatch_harness/wrong_kind.mp4 as a 1-byte file with the .mp4 extension but declared as an image asset (l.image('cert_image', ImageParams{.asset_path='.../wrong_kind.mp4'})). The CLI must reject the kind/extension mismatch at the preflight stage with the canonical error vocabulary.
honesty_note: Per AGENTS.md §honesty: the harness is a 1-byte external file (binary content does not belong in tracked JSON). The CLI must fail-loud at the ASSET-KIND-VALIDATION stage with the canonical error vocabulary + the kind/extension mismatch context. Per AGENTS.md Cat-3 anti-duplication: this JSON schema is shared across all 5 Test #7 + 6 NEW asset preflight fixtures, with the rot_class + Extension/Mismatch-specific tokens differing per fixture — no duplicate schema files.
